center.name: 波兰
center.summary: 波兰是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括针尾鸭、黑琴鸡、黃腳銀鷗等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in northern Norway, northern Sweden, Finland, Belgium, Germany, Switzerland, Austria, the Czech Republic, Slovakia, Hungary, Poland and Siberia as far east as Transbaikal, the Aldan River and the Tian Shan Mountains in North West China

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The redwing thrush breeds in northern regions of Europe and the Palearctic, from Iceland south to northernmost Scotland, and east through Scandinavia, the Baltic States, northern Poland and Belarus, and through most of Russia to about 165°E in Chukotka Autonomous Okrug

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Areas within the breeding range with milder winters such as Great Britain receive large influxes of migrants from colder areas like Scandinavia, Poland, the Baltic States, and Russia; the British winter population is around 3 million. Small numbers occur in winter in northeast North America as far south as Virginia, often in flocks of the similar-looking Bonaparte's gull

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Non-breeding males wintering in India This dabbling duck breeds in northern areas of the Palearctic as far south as about Poland and Mongolia, and in Canada, Alaska and the Midwestern United States

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In mainland Europe, its modern distribution is quite spotty, with the species being found in central Europe in southeastern Germany, central and eastern areas of the Czech Republic, southern Austria, all but western Slovenia, and spottily but broadly in several areas of western, southern and northeastern Poland.Uitz, M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |date = 2015|journal = Contemporary Problems of Ecology|doi = 10.1134/S1995425515030117|volume=8|issue = 3|pages=309–316| doi-access=free| bibcode=2015CPrEc...8..309R }} This species is found in the high Arctic tundra of North America, Ellesmere Island, Iceland, higher mountains of Scotland, Norway, Russia, North Greenland, Siberia, Novaya Zemlya, and Franz Josef Land. During the winter, this bird migrates to the circumglobal northern temperate zone including the south of Canada, the northern United States, the coasts and plains of northern Europe in Great Britain, the Netherlands, Germany, Poland, Ukraine, and east to central Asia. During the last ice age, the snow bunting was widespread throughout continental Europe.{{cite journal | last1 = Tomek | first1 = T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Europe, it has been spreading north and west and now breeds in Poland, eastern Germany, southern Russia and all year round in Ukraine

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Eastern Europe they can be found in Hungary, Latvia, Lithuania, Poland, Belarus, Romania and Ukraine
